subject: Computer Networking
title: 6G: What Comes Next
description: A quick, practical guide to 6G: What Comes Next.

hook.text: 5G is still rolling out, but researchers are already designing 6G. Expected arrival: around 2030.

buildup.text: 6G targets terabit speeds, microsecond latency, and seamless integration of sensing and communication.

discovery.text: Terahertz frequencies offer massive bandwidth but barely penetrate anything, requiring radical new antenna designs.

twist.text: 6G may embed AI directly into the network. The network itself would predict, adapt, and optimize in real time.

climax.text: Digital twins, holographic calls, and global IoT coordination are the ambitious targets driving 6G research.

punchline.text: 6G won't just be faster. It aims to be intelligent.

quiz.question: What frequency range is 6G expected to explore?
